title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Power Grid Corporation

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Plant Manager at Power Grid Corporation
jsonLd.description:
Power Grid Corporation is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Nagpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Power Grid Corporation:
Power Grid Corporation is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Power Grid Corporation!
